fields.label: Hero Image URL
fields.name: _ar_hero_image
fields.instructions: Full URL to the recall hero image. If blank, a gradient background is used.

fields.label: Recall Date
fields.name: _ar_recall_date
fields.instructions: Official recall announcement date from CPSC.

fields.label: Affected Models
fields.name: _ar_affected_models
fields.instructions: One model number per line. Consumers will be directed to cpsc.gov to verify their specific model.

fields.label: CPSC Recall URL
fields.name: _ar_cpsc_url
fields.instructions: Direct link to the official CPSC recall notice page.
